rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts within `annex agree { ... };` blocks, using component types for general contracts and implementations for bindings.
Ensure contracts referencing component ports are placed within the component type scope.
generic_rules: Prioritize AADL model structure as the authoritative source for component details.
Preserve AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annexes; respect component and implementation scopes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be placed inside an `annex agree { ... };` block.
Implementation-level bindings belong in implementation scopes.
anti_patterns: Do not attempt to use AADL properties (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly as AGREE variables without explicit model exposure.
Avoid encoding AADL event ports as numeric values (0, 1, true, false) in AGREE expressions.
